text: Ecstatic to share that our paper 'EcoGeoGuard: AI-IoT Based Landslide Prediction and Smart Agriculture System' was accepted at the DASGRI Congress 2026! Gratitude to all co-authors.
Officially certified! Completed the Google UX Design Specialization. Excited to apply these human-centered interaction design frameworks to secure cyber systems and IoT dashboards.
Announcing the release of INVENTROX — an AI-powered Business OS for Indian SMEs. Integrating POS, GST billing, inventory, and analytics into a single dashboard. Check out the link on my portfolio!
Just published a short write-up on bridging Cloud Security Protocols (AWS IAM) with embedded LoRa physical nodes for critical safety systems. Read it here.
